title: select_with_fee assumes 2 outputs but change=0 path produces 1 output; implicit coupling
description: tx_builder.rs select_with_fee hardcodes n_outputs=2 in sapling_logical_actions(n, 2), assuming there will always be a change output. build_shielded_tx only adds the change output when change > 0. The math happens to be safe because max(n,2) == max(n,1) for n>=2 (and for n=1: max(1,2)=2==max(1,1)*grace_floor=2). But the coupling is implicit: if someone changes the output count calculation (e.g. adds an Orchard output) without updating select_with_fee, the fee will disagree with the builder. Suggested rewrite: pass n_outputs as a parameter to select_with_fee, defaulting to 2 (the change case). Or: compute the actual expected output count before calling select_with_fee and pass it explicitly.
close_reason: Duplicate of nie-3om.3 (same issue: 2-output assumption in select_with_fee; math happens to be correct). Keeping nie-3om.3 as the tracking item.
